description:
About the job
Role: Full-stack (Spring boot + React)
Location: Sydney
Fulltime (Permanent) 

Job Description:
Design, develop, and maintain full-stack applications using React for frontend and Spring Boot for backend.
Build responsive and reusable UI components using React, JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML, and CSS.
Develop secure and scalable RESTful APIs using Spring Boot, Spring MVC, and Spring Data JPA.
Integrate frontend applications with backend services and third-party APIs.
Implement authentication and authorization using Spring Security, JWT, OAuth2.
Work with relational and NoSQL databases such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, or MongoDB.
Apply microservices architecture, API documentation (Swagger/OpenAPI), and best practices.
Use Git, Maven/Gradle, and CI/CD pipelines for build and deployment.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams in Agile/Scrum environments.
Perform code reviews, debugging, performance tuning, and production support.

Interested Candidates can share their updated resumes on sourabh.sood@carecone.com.au or can reach me on +61-251103879.

questions.q: How many years of work experience do you have with Full-Stack Development?
How many years of work experience do you have with Spring Boot?
How many years of work experience do you have with React.js?
